message:
Add jfp update-cli self-update command

Implements CLI self-update functionality:
- Check GitHub releases API for latest version
- Compare semantic versions (current vs latest)
- Download platform-specific binary (darwin/linux/windows)
- Atomic binary replacement with backup and rollback
- Verification of new binary before finalizing

Options:
  --check: Check for updates without installing
  --force: Force reinstall even if up to date
  --json:  Output structured JSON

Features:
- Progress display during download with speed indicator
- Graceful failure handling with rollback to .bak file
- Clear error messages for:
  - Running via bun/node (dev mode, can't self-update)
  - Missing release assets for platform
  - GitHub API rate limits
  - Download/verification failures

Platform support:
- darwin-arm64, darwin-x64
- linux-arm64, linux-x64
- windows-x64

Also updated:
- help.ts: Added update-cli to utilities section
- completion.ts: Added update-cli command and options

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
